files.notes: This file contains an editorial about the return of the Jews to Jerusalem, followed by two Guide Lessons. Lesson II (Work and Business) appears to be just a header with no content, while Lesson III (Genealogy) begins but is cut off mid-sentence. The file appears to be incomplete as it ends abruptly in the middle of the genealogy lesson content.
